title: GENOTYPING OF iPSCS WITH GENE INSERTIONS (Support Protocol 1)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9t55v","text":"This protocol will use genomic DNA isolated from the purified iPSC clones with CLYBL or AAVS1 gene insertion to determine if integration of the transgene has occurred correctly, in a heterozygous or homozygous fashion, and if the floxed selection genes are present. Primer sequences, amplicon sizes, PCR mix composition, and thermal conditions are included in the steps.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"fn173","text":"Please see SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for hazards and safety warnings.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"4bhmh","text":"Primers (see recipe in Reagents and Solutions)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"de1j2","text":"PCR reagents (e.g., Platinum SuperFi PCR Master Mix, Invitrogen, cat. no. 12358250)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"a8tmj","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"53odt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9khvd","text":"Genomic DNA","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"62ie6","text":"Additional reagents and equipment for PCR (Kramer \u0026 Coen, 2001) and agarose gel electrophoresis (Voytas, 2001)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":204777,"guid":"41ADEFC4341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Platinum™ SuperFi™ PCR Master Mix","mol_weight":0,"sku":"12358010","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/12358010?SID=srch-srp-12358010","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":95,"name":"Thermo Fisher Scientific","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com/us/en/home.html","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Set up PCR reaction (also see Kramer & Coen, 2001). For each 10 μl reaction, use the primer pairs recommended in Reagents and Solutions for the given safe-harbor site and donor construct chosen: 1 µL 10 micromolar (µM) Primer 1 1 µL 10 micromolar (µM) Primer 2 1 µL purified genomic DNA from iPSC clone 2 µL H 2 O 5 µL 2 × PCR Master Mix.

Run PCR products on 1 % agarose gel (Voytas, 2001) with interpretation given above for each primer pair. If performing the PCR on samples following Cre excision, increasing the amount of time during the extension step may be necessary to detect the larger un-excised template if a heterogeneous culture is obtained.
creator: Julia Rossmanith
